title: arrhostoxylum acutangulum
intro: Arrhostoxylum acutangulum, also known as the prickly ash, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, native to the Americas and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Arrhostoxylum acutangulum include relief from muscle and joint pain, improved digestion, and reduced anxiety. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
